seo.title: Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta | Join ECAA
seo.description: Join the Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta. Connect with culture, community programs, events, membership, volunteering, EDIR, and support for Ethiopians in Atlanta.

hero.title: Building Intergenerational Connections and Strengthening Community Resilience
hero.description: ECAA exists to serve, connect, and empower the Ethiopian community in Atlanta while helping preserve Ethiopian cultural heritage and support integration into American society.
hero.trustCue: Serving the Ethiopian and Ethiopian American community in Atlanta since 1983.
hero.imageAlt: Ethiopian community members gathered together at an ECAA event in the Atlanta area.

missionSection.title: Our Mission
missionSection.description: ECAA serves, empowers, and advances the interests of Ethiopians and Ethiopian Americans in Atlanta and surrounding areas. We promote cultural pride, community support, education, civic connection, and successful integration into American society while preserving the values and traditions that unite us.

communityPillars.title: What We Stand For
communityPillars.description: ECAA strengthens the Ethiopian and Ethiopian American community in Atlanta through culture, support, and opportunity for every generation.

items.title: Preserve Culture & Heritage
items.description: Celebrate Ethiopian traditions, language, and identity through programs and gatherings that connect generations.

items.title: Support Families & Newcomers
items.description: Help immigrant families, newcomers, and community members access information, support, and a welcoming network in Georgia.

items.title: Empower Youth & Future Generations
items.description: Invest in youth education, leadership, and opportunity so the next generation can thrive with pride and purpose.

programsPreview.title: Programs That Serve Our Community
programsPreview.description: From youth education and newcomer support to health, legal awareness, financial literacy, and cultural connection — ECAA offers programs that meet real community needs.

membershipPreview.title: Join the ECAA Community
membershipPreview.description: Membership helps you stay connected, support community programs, attend events, participate in discussions, and contribute to ECAA's future in Atlanta.

volunteerPreview.title: Volunteer With ECAA
volunteerPreview.description: Volunteers strengthen ECAA by supporting youth programs, event planning, IT, grants, newcomer support, legal awareness, health initiatives, financial literacy, and community services.

donationPreview.title: Your Donation Builds Community
donationPreview.description: Donations support ECAA's community center, cultural programs, youth and family services, and long-term growth for Ethiopians in the Atlanta area.
donationPreview.note: Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Donations may be tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

eventsPreview.title: Community Events
eventsPreview.description: Cultural celebrations, workshops, meetings, and gatherings that bring our community together.
eventsPreview.emptyDescription: Upcoming events will be posted soon. Check back for community gatherings, workshops, and cultural celebrations.

aboutPreview.title: A Community Built Together
aboutPreview.summary: Founded in 1983, ECAA was created by Ethiopian community members who wanted to help newcomers adjust to life in Atlanta while preserving Ethiopian culture and building a stronger community.

whyJoin.title: Why Join ECAA?
whyJoin.description: Membership is more than signing up. It is a way to stay connected, preserve culture, support one another, and help build a stronger future for Ethiopians in Atlanta.

items.title: Belong to a stronger Ethiopian community
items.description: Connect with Ethiopians and Ethiopian Americans across the Atlanta area who share culture, values, and a commitment to community.

items.title: Stay connected to culture and heritage
items.description: Take part in cultural programs, celebrations, and traditions that keep Ethiopian identity alive for every generation.

items.title: Support youth, families, and elders
items.description: Access programs and community networks that support families, students, and elders through every stage of life.

items.title: Attend community events and programs
items.description: Stay informed about gatherings, educational programs, and celebrations that bring the community together throughout the year.

items.title: Participate in EDIR and mutual support
items.description: Be part of a community tradition of mutual support that helps members during times of need and celebration.

items.title: Help shape the future of ECAA
items.description: Membership strengthens ECAA's ability to serve the Ethiopian community in Atlanta and guide programs for years to come.

communityImpact.title: Building Community Through Service, Culture, and Connection
communityImpact.description: For decades, ECAA has served as a trusted home for Ethiopians and Ethiopian Americans in the greater Atlanta area — connecting people to culture, support, and one another.

items.title: 40+ Years of Community Service
items.description: Since 1983, ECAA has worked to strengthen the Ethiopian community in Atlanta through programs, leadership, and service.

items.title: Cultural Events & Celebrations
items.description: ECAA hosts gatherings and cultural observances that bring families and community members together throughout the year.

items.title: Youth and Family Support
items.description: Programs and activities support young people, parents, and families navigating life in the Ethiopian American community.

items.title: Volunteer-Led Community Work
items.description: Dedicated volunteers and leaders help organize events, programs, and services that keep ECAA active and responsive.

items.title: EDIR and Mutual Support
items.description: ECAA supports community traditions of mutual aid that help members during difficult times and important milestones.

items.title: A Home for Ethiopians in Atlanta
items.description: From Stone Mountain to the wider metro area, ECAA offers a welcoming place to connect, participate, and belong.

whoWeServe.title: A Community for Every Generation
whoWeServe.description: Whether you are new to Atlanta or have called it home for years, ECAA welcomes Ethiopians, Ethiopian Americans, and supporters of Ethiopian culture.

items.title: Newcomers and immigrant families
items.description: Find connection, information, and a welcoming community as you build a new life in the Atlanta area.

items.title: Youth and students
items.description: Engage in programs, events, and mentorship that support identity, learning, and leadership.

items.title: Parents and families
items.description: Access resources, events, and networks that support family life and intergenerational connection.

items.title: Elders
items.description: Stay connected to community, culture, and mutual support through gatherings and ECAA programs.

items.title: Professionals and volunteers
items.description: Share your skills, serve on committees, and help lead programs that strengthen the community.

items.title: Supporters of Ethiopian culture
items.description: Join events, donate, and participate in programs that celebrate and preserve Ethiopian heritage in Atlanta.

featuredPrograms.title: Featured Programs
featuredPrograms.description: Explore selected ECAA programs that support children, youth, families, wellness, education, and community growth.

featuredEvents.title: Upcoming Events & Community Updates
featuredEvents.description: Stay connected with ECAA events, announcements, and opportunities to participate in community life.

emptyState.title: Upcoming events will be shared soon
emptyState.description: ECAA events and community updates will appear here as they become available.

waysToGetInvolved.title: Ways to Get Involved
waysToGetInvolved.description: There are many ways to connect with ECAA — whether you join as a member, volunteer your time, give support, or host a gathering.

items.title: Become a Member
items.description: Join ECAA and help strengthen the Ethiopian community in Atlanta.

items.title: Volunteer
items.description: Share your time, skills, and heart with community programs and events.

items.title: Donate
items.description: Support cultural programs, community services, youth initiatives, and long-term growth.

items.title: Book the Hall
items.description: Host meetings, celebrations, workshops, and community gatherings at ECAA.

trustSection.title: Trusted Community Leadership
trustSection.description: ECAA is a community-led nonprofit organization serving Ethiopians and Ethiopian Americans in the greater Atlanta area with transparency and accountability.
trustPoints: Located in Stone Mountain, serving the greater Atlanta Ethiopian community
Community-led leadership with board and committee structure
Public documents, bylaws, and meeting notices available online
Open contact channels for membership, programs, and community questions
trustSection.nonprofitNote: Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Donations may be tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

bookHall.title: Plan Your Next Gathering With ECAA
bookHall.description: Planning a community gathering, meeting, celebration, workshop, or private event? Contact ECAA to learn more about hall availability.
bookHall.importantNote: Submitting a request does not guarantee a reservation. ECAA must confirm availability, requirements, pricing, and approval before the hall is booked.

featuredMedia.title: Community Moments
featuredMedia.description: Photos and videos that highlight ECAA's community, culture, and connection.

emptyState.title: Community media will be shared soon
emptyState.description: Photos, flyers, videos, and community moments will appear here when published.

finalCta.title: Ready to get involved with ECAA?
finalCta.description: Become a member, attend an event, volunteer, or contact ECAA to learn how you can participate in community life.
